portal.summary: Make chosen gun turrets level up, specialize, and carry Veteran Core progression between battlefields.

intro.lede: Install Veteran Cores in your favorite gun turrets, level them through combat, and shape them into snipers, bulwarks, brawlers, machine guns, or elemental hybrids.

paragraphs: Turret XP makes gun turrets grow into named veteran defenders.

Install a Veteran Core in a turret and let it earn XP from real fights. As it levels up, shape it into the defender your factory needs: a long-range sniper, a rapid machine gun, a tough bulwark, or a brutal close-range brawler.
Veteran Cores carry a turret's level, upgrades, elements, name, and combat history. Move the core to a new turret when the front line shifts, or keep it on a trusted defender and watch it grow.

release_notes.intro: Turn ordinary gun turrets into veteran defenders with portable cores, XP, upgrades, specializations, elemental material ranks, and names.
validation: See changelog.txt for the Factorio-compatible version history.

highlights: Only chosen turrets become unique, so ordinary gun turrets stay stackable.
Earn XP from damage and kill contribution.
Spend points on damage, shield, ammo productivity, shield-on-hit, regeneration, crits, luck, double shots, XP gain, and bouncing bullets. Brawler lists 10% Lifesteal as an innate specialization stat.
Pick specializations and sub-specializations with strong tradeoffs.
Feed fire, electric, explosive, or toxic resources into passive element ranks to strengthen elemental effects and combos.
Name favorite turrets and show their level above them.
Choose exact Veteran Cores from platform hubs for space-platform defenses.
Tune XP pacing in mod settings.

features.title: Veteran Cores
features.body: Only chosen turrets become unique. A core stores XP, upgrades, elements, name, and battle history, then moves by itself or bound to its turret body when the front line shifts.

features.title: Combat Growth
features.body: Turrets earn XP from damage and kill contribution. Points buy damage, shield, ammo productivity, shield-on-hit, repair, crits, luck, double shots, XP gain, and bouncing bullets. Brawler lists 10% Lifesteal as an innate specialization stat.

features.title: Specialized Defenders
features.body: Choose strong identities with tradeoffs: long-range snipers, rapid machine guns, tough bulwarks, or brutal close-range brawlers.

features.title: Element Projects
features.body: Pick fire, electric, explosive, or toxic effects, feed larger passive material ranks to strengthen them, and combine two elements on veteran turrets.

playtest.intro: Install from the in-game Mods interface, place a gun turret, install a Veteran Core, add ammo, and let it fight.
steps: Install or dev-create a Veteran Core.
Check that XP and lifetime damage increase.
Name the core, toggle its floating label, and move it to another turret or bind it for one-item turret moves.
Run /turret-xp-dev to test level gates, complete passive element material ranks, then buy an upgrade or augment.
Report confusing stats, pacing issues, or runtime errors.
